ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page or user who posted */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the page or user who posted */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the post */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., link, photo, video) */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., published, draft) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the post */,
  "love_count" INTEGER /* Number of love reactions on the post */,
  "wow_count" INTEGER /* Number of wow reactions on the post */,
  "haha_count" INTEGER /* Number of haha reactions on the post */,
  "sad_count" INTEGER /* Number of sad reactions on the post */,
  "thankful_count" INTEGER /* Number of thankful reactions on the post */,
  "angry_count" INTEGER /* Number of angry reactions on the post */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link associated with the post */,
  "picture" TEXT /* Picture associated with the post */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* Direct URL to the post */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the post is promoted */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Estimated number of people who saw the post */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was displayed */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the post */,
  "video_views" INTEGER /* Number of video views (if applicable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the post was made (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., personal, business) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers/fans */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the page was last updated */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the page is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "roles" TEXT /* JSON array of roles (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "comment_url" TEXT /* Direct URL to the comment for easy access */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been reported */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the like is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the like */,
  "like_time" TEXT /* Date and time the like was made */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the like has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the share is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the share */,
  "share_time" TEXT /* Date and time the share was made */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* Direct URL to the shared post for easy access */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the share has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the reaction is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., love, wow, haha, sad, thankful, angry) */,
  "reaction_time" TEXT /* Date and time the reaction was made */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reaction has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the tag is on */,
  "tag_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tag */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the category is on */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_categories_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the type is on */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the type has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_types_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
